Home>Tournaments>United Rugby Championship>United Rugby Championship Table 2025 / 2026

URC Logs for 2025 / 2026

Points system :
  • 4 points will be awarded for a win
  • 2 points will be awarded for a draw
Bonus points :
  • 1 point will be awarded to a team that loses a match by 7 points or less
  • 1 point will be awarded to a team scoring 4 tries or more in a match

Legend :

  • 👇 : Clickable area
  • PTS : Points
  • PL : Played
  • W : Wins
  • D : Draws
  • L : Losses
  • DIFF : Differential
  • BP : Bonus Points
  • Form 👇 : Results from previous games
  • Evolution 👇 : Ranking Evolution
  • W% : Win percentage
  • W5 : Wins by 5 points or less
  • W15 : Wins by 15 points or less
  • W+ : Wins by more than 15 points
  • L5 : Losses by 5 points or less
  • L15 : Losses by 15 points or less
  • L+ : Losses by more than 15 points
  • PF : Points for
  • PA : Points against
  • PFA : Points For Average
  • PAA : Points Against Average
  • TF : Tries for
  • TA : Tries against
  • TB : Tries bonus points
  • LB : Losing bonus points
  • YC : Yellow Cards
  • RC : Red Cards
  • OC : Orange Cards
